topPlaces.name: Shoolagiri
topPlaces.description: Shoolagiri is a large village and Taluk in the Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu. It lies along National Highway 7, and is overlooked by a hill with three peaks.

topPlaces.name: Bellatti
topPlaces.description: Bellatti is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Shirhatti taluk of Gadag district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Nallarallapalli

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Shoolagiri?
faq.a: The best time to visit Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Shoolagiri is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Shoolagiri?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (68 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (59 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Shoolagiri?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Shoolagiri at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Shoolagiri?
faq.a: Stays in Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Shoolagiri start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Shoolagiri?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shoolagiri, Bellatti, Nallarallapalli, Gudusalapalli, Chennapalli.
